<html lang="ru"><head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Создать задачу — Bitrix24</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&family=Unbounded:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{--bg:#161616;--glass-solid:#12151f;--glass-border:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);--glass-border-h:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);--surface2:rgba(18,21,31,0.4);--accent:#10b981;--accent-dark:#0ea472;--accent-dim:rgba(16,185,129,0.3);--accent-glow:rgba(16,185,129,0.12);--accent-glow-s:rgba(16,185,129,0.2);--border-focus:#10b981;--text:#e2e8f8;--text-m:#8892a8;--text-d:#4a5270;--danger:#ff4f4f;--success:#22c55e;--warning:#f59e0b;--dim-red:rgba(255,79,79,0.35);--mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;--display:'Unbounded',sans-serif}
  *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
  body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden}
  body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 15% 45%,rgba(16,185,129,0.05) 0%,transparent 100%),radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 60% at 85% 25%,rgba(16,185,129,0.03) 0%,transparent 100%),radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 40% at 50% 85%,rgba(16,185,129,0.025) 0%,transparent 100%)}

  .topbar{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;background:rgba(22,22,22,0.92);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);padding:0 32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:56px}
  .topbar-logo{font-family:var(--display);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-0.02em}
  .topbar-logo span{color:var(--accent)}
  .topbar-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
  .webhook-badge{font-size:11px;color:var(--success);display:none;align-items:center;gap:5px}
  .webhook-badge.show{display:flex}
  .wb-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--success);animation:pdot 2s ease infinite}
  @keyframes pdot{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.4}}
  .gear-btn{width:36px;height:36px;background:rgba(18,21,31,0.6);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .15s;position:relative;user-select:none;flex-shrink:0}
  .gear-btn:hover{border-color:var(--glass-border-h);background:var(--accent-glow)}
  .gear-btn.active{border-color:var(--warning);background:rgba(245,158,11,0.1)}
  .gear-dot{position:absolute;top:-3px;right:-3px;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--warning);border:2px solid var(--bg);display:none}
  .gear-dot.show{display:block}

  .settings-panel{position:sticky;top:56px;z-index:99;background:rgba(18,21,31,0.6);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);overflow:hidden;max-height:0;transition:max-height .35s ease,padding .35s ease;padding:0 32px}
  .settings-panel.open{max-height:120px;padding:16px 32px}
  .settings-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:12px}
  .settings-field{flex:1}
  .settings-field label{display:block;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--warning);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:6px}
  .si input[type="text"]{width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;padding:9px 12px;outline:none;transition:border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s}
  .si input[type="text"]:focus{border-color:var(--border-focus);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow)}
  .ss{font-size:11px;margin-top:5px;color:var(--text-d);transition:color .2s}
  .ss.ok{color:var(--accent)}
  .btn-sv{background:var(--warning);color:#000;border:none;border-radius:6px;padding:9px 18px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;transition:opacity .15s;flex-shrink:0}
  .btn-sv:hover{opacity:.85}

  .outer{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:944px;margin:0 auto;padding:36px 32px 80px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:252px 1fr;gap:28px;align-items:start}

  .sidebar{position:sticky;top:76px;max-height:calc(100vh - 96px);overflow-y:auto;align-self:start}
  .sidebar-card{background:rgba(18,21,31,0.72);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.2),0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.3),0 32px 64px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
  .sidebar-toggle{background:var(--surface2);border:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);padding:13px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;cursor:pointer;width:100%;font-family:var(--mono);transition:background .15s}
  .sidebar-toggle:hover{background:var(--accent-glow)}
  .sidebar-toggle-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
  .sidebar-toggle-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--text-m)}
  .sidebar-chevron{width:14px;height:14px;transition:transform .3s ease;color:var(--text-d);flex-shrink:0}
  .sidebar-chevron.open{transform:rotate(180deg)}
  .sidebar-body{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .4s ease,padding .3s ease;padding:0 14px}
  .sidebar-body.open{max-height:2000px;padding:14px}
  .step-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
  .step-item{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:9px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
  .step-item:first-child{padding-top:0}.step-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;padding-bottom:0}
  .step-num{width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--accent-glow-s);border:1px solid var(--accent-dim);color:var(--accent);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px}
  .step-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:2px;line-height:1.3}
  .step-desc{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-m);line-height:1.6}
  .step-desc kbd{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:3px;padding:0 4px;font-size:10px;color:var(--accent);font-family:var(--mono)}
  .sidebar-tip{margin-top:10px;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.15);border-radius:6px;padding:9px 11px}
  .sidebar-tip-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:3px}
  .sidebar-tip-text{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-m);line-height:1.6}
  .sb-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);background:rgba(18,21,31,0.4);color:var(--text-d);font-size:10px;margin:2px 2px 2px 0;vertical-align:middle}
  .sb-chip .sb-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--text-d)}
  .sb-key{display:inline-block;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:3px;padding:0 5px;font-size:10px;color:var(--accent)}
  .sb-req{color:var(--danger);font-size:9px;font-weight:700}
  .sb-opt{color:var(--text-d);font-size:9px}
  .sb-tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:8px 0 0;font-size:10px}
  .sb-tbl th{text-align:left;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--text-d);padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);font-size:9px}
  .sb-tbl td{padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:var(--text-m)}
  .sb-tbl tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}

  .card{background:rgba(18,21,31,0.72);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;animation:fu .4s ease both;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.2),0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.3),0 32px 64px rgba(0,0,0,.2);transform:translateY(0);transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.25,.46,.45,.94),box-shadow .4s cubic-bezier(.25,.46,.45,.94)}
  .card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.25),0 18px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.35),0 44px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}
  .card+.card{margin-top:14px}
  .card-header{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--surface2)}
  .card-num{width:22px;height:22px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:5px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}
  .card-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text)}
  .card-body{padding:18px}
  .field{margin-bottom:14px}.field:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
  label.fl{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-m);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:6px}
  .req{color:var(--danger);font-size:14px;line-height:1}

  input[type="text"],input[type="date"],textarea{width:100%;background:rgba(10,12,18,0.6);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;padding:9px 12px;outline:none;transition:border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s;line-height:1.6}
  textarea{overflow:hidden;resize:none;min-height:38px}input[type="date"]{color-scheme:dark}
  input::placeholder,textarea::placeholder{color:var(--text-d)}
  input[type="text"]:focus,input[type="date"]:focus,textarea:focus{border-color:var(--border-focus);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow)}
  input.error,textarea.error{border-color:var(--danger)}
  .error-msg{font-size:11px;color:var(--danger);margin-top:4px;display:none}
  .error-msg.show{display:block}
  .field-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:4px}
  .char-count{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-d)}

  .section-field{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px}.section-field:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
  .section-icon{flex-shrink:0;width:16px;height:16px;margin-top:3px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
  .section-icon svg{display:block;width:16px;height:16px;transition:stroke .25s ease}
  .section-field[data-state="empty"] .section-icon svg{stroke:var(--accent-dim)}
  .section-field[data-state="filled"] .section-icon svg{stroke:var(--success)}
  .section-content{flex:1;min-width:0}
  .section-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-m);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:4px}

  .tags-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;background:rgba(10,12,18,0.6);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 9px;min-height:40px;cursor:text;transition:border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s}
  .tags-wrap:focus-within{border-color:var(--border-focus);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow)}
  .tags-wrap.error{border-color:var(--danger)}
  .tag-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;background:var(--accent-glow-s);border:1px solid var(--accent-dim);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 7px;font-size:11px;color:var(--accent);white-space:nowrap}
  .tag-chip-remove{cursor:pointer;opacity:.5;font-size:13px;line-height:1;transition:opacity .15s}.tag-chip-remove:hover{opacity:1}
  .tag-input{border:none!important;background:transparent!important;box-shadow:none!important;padding:2px 4px!important;font-size:13px;min-width:120px;flex:1;outline:none;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--mono)}
  .tag-hint{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-d);margin-top:4px}

  .deadline-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}.deadline-row input[type="date"]{flex:1}
  .quick-dl{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border-h);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;white-space:nowrap;user-select:none;flex-shrink:0}
  .quick-dl:hover{border-color:var(--accent-dim);color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-glow)}
  .quick-dl.flash{border-color:var(--accent-dim);color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-glow-s)}

  .crew-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}
  .crew-chip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border-h);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;user-select:none}
  .crew-chip:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:var(--text)}
  .crew-chip.active{border-color:var(--accent-dim);background:var(--accent-glow-s);color:var(--accent)}
  .crew-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--text-d);transition:all .2s}
  .crew-chip.active .crew-dot{background:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--accent-dim)}
  .crew-chip.dimmed .crew-dot{background:var(--dim-red)}
  .crew-chip.dimmed{opacity:.45;pointer-events:none}
  .crew-id{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-d);font-weight:500}
  .crew-chip.active .crew-id{color:var(--accent-dim)}

  .crew-section-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
  .crew-section-label svg{width:13px;height:13px;stroke:var(--accent);fill:none;stroke-width:1.2;stroke-linecap:round}

  .project-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}
  .proj-chip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border-h);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;user-select:none}
  .proj-chip:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:var(--text)}
  .proj-chip.active{border-color:var(--accent-dim);background:var(--accent-glow-s);color:var(--accent)}
  .proj-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--text-d);transition:all .2s}
  .proj-chip.active .proj-dot{background:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--accent-dim)}
  .proj-chip.dimmed .proj-dot{background:var(--dim-red)}
  .proj-chip.dimmed{opacity:.45;pointer-events:none}
  .proj-id{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-d);font-weight:500}
  .proj-chip.active .proj-id{color:var(--accent-dim)}

  .file-upload-area{border:1px dashed var(--glass-border);border-radius:6px;padding:14px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;background:rgba(10,12,18,0.6);position:relative}
  .file-upload-area:hover,.file-upload-area.drag-over{border-color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-glow)}
  .file-upload-area input[type="file"]{position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;cursor:pointer;width:100%;height:100%}
  .file-upload-text{font-size:12px;color:var(--text-m);line-height:1.6}.file-upload-text span{color:var(--accent)}
  .file-list{margin-top:7px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
  .file-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:6px;padding:5px 9px;font-size:11px}
  .file-item-name{flex:1;color:var(--text);overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
  .file-item-size{color:var(--text-d);flex-shrink:0}
  .file-item-status{flex-shrink:0;width:20px;text-align:center}
  .file-item-remove{cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-d);font-size:15px;transition:color .15s;flex-shrink:0;line-height:1}.file-item-remove:hover{color:var(--danger)}
  .upload-progress{height:3px;background:var(--glass-border);border-radius:2px;margin-top:7px;overflow:hidden;display:none}
  .upload-progress-bar{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;transition:width .3s ease;width:0%}
  .upload-progress.show{display:block}

  .preview-wrap{background:rgba(10,12,18,0.6);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:6px;padding:12px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.8;color:var(--text-d);min-height:48px;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word}
  .preview-wrap.has-content{color:var(--text)}
  .divider{height:1px;background:var(--glass-border);margin:14px 0}

  .flame-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0}
  .flame-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--text-d);pointer-events:none;user-select:none;transition:color .3s ease}
  .flame-label.on{color:#ff3d00}
  .flame-wrap{width:26px;height:30px;flex-shrink:0}
  .flame-icon{display:block;width:22px;height:26px;transform-origin:50% 88%;cursor:pointer;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
  .flame-l1{fill:#3a3f52;opacity:.45;transition:fill .3s ease}.flame-l2{fill:#3a3f52;opacity:.65;transition:fill .3s ease}.flame-l3{fill:#3a3f52;opacity:.82;transition:fill .3s ease}.flame-l4{fill:#3a3f52;opacity:1;transition:fill .3s ease}
  .flame-icon:not(.lit):hover .flame-l1{fill:#5f657d}.flame-icon:not(.lit):hover .flame-l2{fill:#5f657d}.flame-icon:not(.lit):hover .flame-l3{fill:#5f657d}.flame-icon:not(.lit):hover .flame-l4{fill:#5f657d}
  .flame-icon.lit .flame-l1{fill:#8b1a00}.flame-icon.lit .flame-l2{fill:#e63e00}.flame-icon.lit .flame-l3{fill:#ff6d00}.flame-icon.lit .flame-l4{fill:#ffab00}
  .flame-icon.igniting{animation:ignite .45s cubic-bezier(.25,1.2,.5,1)}.flame-icon.extinguishing{animation:extinguish .3s ease}
  @keyframes ignite{0%{transform:scale(.88) rotate(-1.5deg)}30%{transform:scale(1.12) rotate(1deg)}55%{transform:scale(.95) rotate(-.5deg)}80%{transform:scale(1.04) rotate(.3deg)}100%{transform:scale(1) rotate(0)}}
  @keyframes extinguish{0%{transform:scale(1) rotate(0)}50%{transform:scale(.92) rotate(-.8deg)}100%{transform:scale(1) rotate(0)}}

  .repeat-btn{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border-h);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text-m);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;user-select:none;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0}
  .repeat-btn:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:var(--accent-dim);color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-glow)}.repeat-btn:disabled{opacity:.25;cursor:not-allowed}

  .btn-wrap{margin-top:20px}
  .btn-submit{width:100%;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-family:var(--display);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;border:none;border-radius:6px;padding:15px 24px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(16,185,129,0.2)}
  .btn-submit:hover{background:var(--accent-dark);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(16,185,129,0.35)}
  .btn-submit:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none;box-shadow:none}
  .btn-submit .spinner{width:15px;height:15px;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3);border-top-color:#fff;border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite;display:none}
  .btn-submit.loading .spinner{display:block}.btn-submit.loading .btn-text{opacity:.7}
  .btn-hotkey{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;opacity:.4;margin-left:4px}

  .toast{position:fixed;bottom:28px;right:28px;padding:13px 18px;border-radius:8px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;font-weight:500;z-index:999;transform:translateY(14px);opacity:0;transition:all .25s ease;max-width:400px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;border:1px solid;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.5);background:rgba(18,21,31,0.8);backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
  .toast.show{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}
  .toast.success{border-color:rgba(34,197,94,0.4);color:var(--success)}.toast.error{border-color:rgba(255,79,79,0.4);color:var(--danger)}
  .toast-icon{font-size:15px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px}.toast-body{flex:1}.toast-title{font-weight:700;margin-bottom:2px}.toast-msg{font-size:11px;opacity:.8;line-height:1.5}

  @keyframes fu{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
  @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
  .dynamic-fields{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
  .dynamic-field-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px;position:relative}
  .dynamic-field-row textarea{flex:1;min-height:38px;transition:border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s}
  .add-field-btn,.remove-field-btn{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border-h);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text-d);font-size:16px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .15s;margin-top:1px;line-height:1;user-select:none}
  .add-field-btn:hover{border-color:var(--accent-dim);color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-glow)}
  .remove-field-btn{color:var(--text-d);font-size:18px}
  .remove-field-btn:hover{border-color:var(--danger);color:var(--danger);background:rgba(255,79,79,0.1)}
  .dynamic-hint{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-d);margin-top:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
  .dynamic-hint .dynamic-count{color:var(--accent);font-weight:600}

  @media(max-width:800px){.topbar{padding:0 16px}.settings-panel{padding:0 16px}.settings-panel.open{max-height:160px;padding:14px 16px}.settings-row{flex-direction:column;gap:8px}.btn-sv{width:100%;text-align:center}.outer{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:16px 16px 60px;gap:0}.sidebar{display:none}.toast{bottom:14px;right:12px;left:12px;max-width:none}.deadline-row{flex-direction:column}.deadline-row input[type="date"]{width:100%}.deadline-row .quick-dl{width:100%;text-align:center;justify-content:center;display:flex}.card-header{flex-wrap:wrap}.repeat-btn{margin-left:0}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="topbar">
  <div class="topbar-logo">Bitrix24 <span>Tasks</span> <span id="verBadge" style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text-d);margin-left:6px;opacity:.7">v5</span></div>
  <div class="topbar-right">
    <div class="webhook-badge" id="webhookBadge"><div class="wb-dot"></div>Подключено</div>
    <div class="gear-btn" id="gearBtn" title="Настройки">
      <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="2.5"></circle><path d="M8 1v2.5M8 12.5V15M1 8h2.5M12.5 8H15M2.9 2.9l1.8 1.8M11.3 11.3l1.8 1.8M13.1 2.9l-1.8 1.8M4.7 11.3l-1.8 1.8"></path></svg>
      <div class="gear-dot" id="gearDot"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="settings-panel" id="settingsPanel">
  <div class="settings-row si">
    <div class="settings-field">
      <label>Вебхук Bitrix24</label>
      <input type="text" id="webhookUrl" placeholder="https://ПОРТАЛ.bitrix24.ru/rest/1/ТОКЕН/">
      <div class="ss" id="webhookStatus">Вставь URL и нажми «Сохранить»</div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-sv" id="btnSaveWebhook">Сохранить</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="outer">
  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-card">
      <button class="sidebar-toggle" id="sidebarToggle" type="button">
        <div class="sidebar-toggle-left">
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 13 13" fill="none" stroke="#8892a8" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M2 3h9M2 6.5h9M2 10h6"></path><circle cx="10" cy="10" r="1.5"></circle></svg>
          <div class="sidebar-toggle-title">Гайд по форме</div>
        </div>
        <svg class="sidebar-chevron" id="sidebarChevron" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 5l4 4 4-4"></path></svg>
      </button>
      <div class="sidebar-body" id="sidebarBody">
        <div class="step-list">
          <div class="step-item"><div class="step-num">1</div><div><div class="step-title">Настройка</div><div class="step-desc">Шестерёнка → вебхук → «Сохранить». Один раз, URL в браузере.</div></div></div>
          <div class="step-item"><div class="step-num">2</div><div><div class="step-title">Название + важность</div><div class="step-desc">Ввести название. Пламя = приоритет 2.</div></div></div>
          <div class="step-item"><div class="step-num">3</div><div><div class="step-title">Команда</div><div class="step-desc">Три блока — независимые. <span class="sb-req">*</span> обязательны.</div><div style="margin-top:5px"><span class="sb-chip"><span class="sb-dot"></span>Константин</span><span class="sb-chip"><span class="sb-dot"></span>Саша</span><span class="sb-chip"><span class="sb-dot"></span>Тимур</span><span class="sb-chip"><span class="sb-dot"></span>Тест</span></div><div style="margin-top:4px;font-size:9px;color:var(--text-d);line-height:1.6">Разработчик = исполнитель<br>Постановщик = АМ / ВМ = автор<br>Наблюдатель = АМ / ВМ <span class="sb-opt">(необяз.)</span></div></div></div>
          <div class="step-item"><div class="step-num">4</div><div><div class="step-title">Дедлайн</div><div class="step-desc">Дата или быстрые кнопки: <span class="sb-key">+3д</span> <span class="sb-key">+7д</span> <span class="sb-key">+14д</span>.</div></div></div>
          <div class="step-item"><div class="step-num">5</div><div><div class="step-title">Описание <span class="sb-opt">необяз.</span></div><div class="step-desc">Цель, что сделать, критерии, материалы, файлы.</div></div></div>
          <div class="step-item"><div class="step-num">6</div><div><div class="step-title">Проект <span class="sb-req">*</span></div><div class="step-desc">Один клик = GROUP_ID. 14 проектов.</div></div></div>
          <div class="step-item"><div class="step-num">7</div><div><div class="step-title">Отправка</div><div class="step-desc">«Создать» или <span class="sb-key">Ctrl</span>+<span class="sb-key">Enter</span>. «Повторить» — копия прошлой.</div></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="sidebar-tip">
          <div class="sidebar-tip-label">Что куда попадает</div>
          <table class="sb-tbl">
            <tbody><tr><th>В форме</th><th>Поле API</th></tr>
            <tr><td style="color:var(--text)">Разработчик</td><td>RESPONSIBLE_ID</td></tr>
            <tr><td style="color:var(--text)">Постановщик</td><td>CREATED_BY</td></tr>
            <tr><td style="color:var(--text)">Наблюдатель</td><td>observers.add</td></tr>
            <tr><td style="color:var(--text)">Проект</td><td>GROUP_ID</td></tr>
            <tr><td style="color:var(--text)">Пламя</td><td>PRIORITY = 2</td></tr>
            <tr><td style="color:var(--text)">Файлы</td><td>UF_TASK_WEBDAV_FILES</td></tr>
          </tbody></table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <div>
    <form id="taskForm" novalidate="">

      <div class="card" style="animation-delay:.04s">
        <div class="card-header">
          <div class="card-num">1</div>
          <div class="card-title">Название</div>
          <button type="button" class="repeat-btn" id="repeatBtn" disabled="">
            <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M1 4.5V2.5a1 1 0 011-1h5l3 3v5a1 1 0 01-1 1H5"></path><path d="M1 7.5l2.5 2.5 4-4"></path></svg>
            Повторить
          </button>
          <div class="flame-btn">
            <span class="flame-label" id="flameLabel">Важность</span>
            <div class="flame-wrap"><svg class="flame-icon" id="flameIcon" viewBox="0 0 20 24"><path class="flame-l1" d="M10 0C6.2 4.2 1.2 8.2 1.2 13a8.8 8.8 0 0017.6 0C18.8 8.2 13.8 4.2 10 0z"></path><path class="flame-l2" d="M9.5 2.5C7 5.5 3.5 8.5 3.5 12.5a6.5 6.5 0 0013 0C16.5 8.5 12 5.5 9.5 2.5z"></path><path class="flame-l3" d="M10.5 5C8.8 7 6 9 6 11.5a4 4 0 008 0C14 9 11.2 7 10.5 5z"></path><path class="flame-l4" d="M10 7.5C9.2 8.5 7.8 9.8 7.8 11.2a2.2 2.2 0 004.4 0c0-1.4-1.4-2.7-2.2-3.7z"></path></svg></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="field">
            <label class="fl">Имя задачи <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" id="taskTitle" placeholder="Краткое и чёткое название" maxlength="255">
            <div class="field-meta"><div class="error-msg" id="titleError">Обязательное поле</div><div class="char-count" id="titleCount">0 / 255</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card" style="animation-delay:.08s">
        <div class="card-header"><div class="card-num">2</div><div class="card-title">Команда</div></div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="crew-section-label"><svg viewBox="0 0 13 13"><circle cx="6.5" cy="4" r="2.5"></circle><path d="M1 12c0-3 2.5-5.5 5.5-5.5S12 9 12 12"></path></svg>Разработчик</div>
          <div class="crew-grid" id="devGrid"><div class="crew-chip" data-id="18" data-grid="devGrid"><span class="crew-dot"></span><span>Константин</span></div><div class="crew-chip" data-id="38" data-grid="devGrid"><span class="crew-dot"></span><span>Александр</span></div><div class="crew-chip" data-id="54" data-grid="devGrid"><span class="crew-dot"></span><span>Саша</span></div><div class="crew-chip" data-id="82" data-grid="devGrid"><span class="crew-dot"></span><span>Тимур</span></div><div class="crew-chip" data-id="92" data-grid="devGrid"><span class="crew-dot"></span><span>Елена</span></div><div class="crew-chip" data-id="98" data-grid="devGrid"><span class="crew-dot"></span><span>Ольга</span></div><div class="crew-chip" data-id="94" data-grid="devGrid"><span class="crew-dot"></span><span>Тест</span></div></div>
          <div style="height:1px;background:var(--glass-border);margin:16px 0"></div>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px">
            <div>
              <div class="crew-section-label"><svg viewBox="0 0 13 13"><path d="M2 2h9M2 5h6M2 8h9M2 11h4"></path></svg>Постановщик</div>
              <div class="crew-grid" id="mgrGrid"><div class="crew-chip" data-id="116" data-grid="mgrGrid"><span class="crew-dot"></span><span>АМ</span></div><div class="crew-chip" data-id="1" data-grid="mgrGrid"><span class="crew-dot"></span><span>ВМ</span></div></div>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align:right">
              <div class="crew-section-label" style="display:inline-flex"><svg viewBox="0 0 13 13"><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="5.5"></circle><path d="M6.5 3v3l2 1.5"></path></svg>Наблюдатель</div>
              <div class="crew-grid" id="obsGrid" style="justify-content:flex-end"><div class="crew-chip" data-id="116" data-grid="obsGrid"><span class="crew-dot"></span><span>АМ</span></div><div class="crew-chip" data-id="1" data-grid="obsGrid"><span class="crew-dot"></span><span>ВМ</span></div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card" style="animation-delay:.12s">
        <div class="card-header"><div class="card-num">3</div><div class="card-title">Сроки</div></div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="field">
            <label class="fl">Крайний срок</label>
            <div class="deadline-row">
              <input type="date" id="taskDeadline">
              <button type="button" class="quick-dl" data-days="3">+3д</button>
              <button type="button" class="quick-dl" data-days="7">+7д</button>
              <button type="button" class="quick-dl" data-days="14">+14д</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card" style="animation-delay:.16s">
        <div class="card-header"><div class="card-num">4</div><div class="card-title">Описание</div></div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="section-field" data-state="empty"><div class="section-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="6"></circle><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="2.5"></circle><line x1="8" y1="2" x2="8" y2="5.5"></line><line x1="8" y1="10.5" x2="8" y2="14"></line><line x1="2" y1="8" x2="5.5" y2="8"></line><line x1="10.5" y1="8" x2="14" y2="8"></line></svg></div><div class="section-content"><div class="section-label">Цель</div><textarea id="fieldGoal" data-icon-field="" rows="1" placeholder="Зачем делаем и какой результат."></textarea></div></div>
          <div class="section-field" data-state="empty" id="todoSection"><div class="section-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5.5 3.5L4 5l1.5 1.5M8.5 3.5L10 5 8.5 6.5"></path><line x1="6.5" y1="11" x2="9.5" y2="11"></line><line x1="3" y1="8.5" x2="13" y2="8.5"></line><line x1="3" y1="13.5" x2="13" y2="13.5"></line></svg></div><div class="section-content"><div class="section-label">Что сделать</div><div class="dynamic-fields" id="todoDynamicFields"><div class="dynamic-field-row"><textarea class="dynamic-input" data-group="todo" data-icon-field="" rows="1" placeholder="- действие 1
- действие 2"></textarea><button type="button" class="add-field-btn" data-group="todo" title="Добавить поле">+</button></div></div><div class="dynamic-hint"><span class="dynamic-count" id="todoCount">1 / 10</span> · <span class="sb-key">Enter</span> — добавить · <span class="sb-key">Shift+Enter</span> — новая строка</div></div></div>
          <div class="section-field" data-state="empty" id="dodSection"><div class="section-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="6"></circle><path d="M5 8l2 2 4-4"></path></svg></div><div class="section-content"><div class="section-label">Критерии приёмки</div><div class="dynamic-fields" id="dodDynamicFields"><div class="dynamic-field-row"><textarea class="dynamic-input" data-group="dod" data-icon-field="" rows="1" placeholder="- что проверяем при сдаче"></textarea><button type="button" class="add-field-btn" data-group="dod" title="Добавить поле">+</button></div></div><div class="dynamic-hint"><span class="dynamic-count" id="dodCount">1 / 10</span> · <span class="sb-key">Enter</span> — добавить · <span class="sb-key">Shift+Enter</span> — новая строка</div></div></div>
          <div class="section-field" data-state="empty" id="contactSection"><div class="section-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M2 4h12M2 8h8M2 12h10"></path><circle cx="14" cy="12" r="2"></circle></svg></div><div class="section-content"><div class="section-label">Контакт</div><textarea id="fieldContact" data-icon-field="" rows="1" placeholder="Кому писать вопросы по задаче"></textarea></div></div>
          <div class="section-field" data-state="empty"><div class="section-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M6.5 2a3.5 3.5 0 014.24 4.24l-1.2 1.2M9.5 14a3.5 3.5 0 01-4.24-4.24l1.2-1.2"></path></svg></div><div class="section-content"><div class="section-label">Материалы</div><textarea id="fieldMaterials" data-icon-field="" rows="1" placeholder="https://..."></textarea></div></div>
          <div class="section-field" data-state="empty"><div class="section-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M1.5 4v7a1 1 0 001 1h11a1 1 0 001-1V5a1 1 0 00-1-1H7.5L6.5 3H2.5a1 1 0 00-1 1z"></path></svg></div><div class="section-content"><div class="section-label">Файлы</div><div class="file-upload-area" id="dropZone"><input type="file" id="fileInput" multiple=""><div class="file-upload-text">Перетащи или <span>выбери</span></div></div><div class="upload-progress" id="uploadProgress"><div class="upload-progress-bar" id="uploadBar"></div></div><div class="file-list" id="fileList"></div></div></div>
          <div class="divider"></div>
          <div class="section-label" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-m);margin-bottom:7px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em">Предпросмотр</div>
          <div class="preview-wrap" id="descPreview">Заполни поля — здесь появится текст</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card" style="animation-delay:.2s">
        <div class="card-header"><div class="card-num">5</div><div class="card-title">Проект</div></div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="project-grid" id="projGrid"><div class="proj-chip" data-id="78"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>Backlog</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="6"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>Бигап</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="32"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>Дакар</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="66"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>Иванов</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="36"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>Медицина КЗ</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="4"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>Живое пиво</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="20"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>ВДЛ</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="50"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>Белолапотко</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="42"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>ИТ Контроль</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="62"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>Нейс Юг</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="18"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>Самокаты</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="70"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>МАРКЕТДЖЕТ</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="72"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>Керамика</span></div><div class="proj-chip" data-id="52"><span class="proj-dot"></span><span>ОПТИМАПЛАСТ</span></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="btn-wrap">
        <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" id="submitBtn"><div class="spinner"></div><span class="btn-text">Создать задачу</span><span class="btn-hotkey">Ctrl+Enter</span></button>
      </div>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="toast"><div class="toast-icon" id="toastIcon"></div><div class="toast-body"><div class="toast-title" id="toastTitle"></div><div class="toast-msg" id="toastMsg"></div></div></div>

<script>
let flameOn=false,tags=[],selectedFiles=[],settingsOpen=false;
let selectedDevId=null,selectedMgrId=null,selectedObsId=null,selectedProjId=null;
const MAX_DYNAMIC=10;

const DEVS=[{name:'Константин',id:'18'},{name:'Александр',id:'38'},{name:'Саша',id:'54'},{name:'Тимур',id:'82'},{name:'Елена',id:'92'},{name:'Ольга',id:'98'},{name:'Тест',id:'94'}];
const MGRS=[{name:'АМ',id:'116'},{name:'ВМ',id:'1'}];
const OBSS=[{name:'АМ',id:'116'},{name:'ВМ',id:'1'}];
const PROJS=[
  {name:'Backlog',id:'78'},{name:'Бигап',id:'6'},{name:'Дакар',id:'32'},{name:'Иванов',id:'66'},
  {name:'Медицина КЗ',id:'36'},{name:'Живое пиво',id:'4'},{name:'ВДЛ',id:'20'},{name:'Белолапотко',id:'50'},
  {name:'ИТ Контроль',id:'42'},{name:'Нейс Юг',id:'62'},{name:'Самокаты',id:'18'},{name:'МАРКЕТДЖЕТ',id:'70'},
  {name:'Керамика',id:'72'},{name:'ОПТИМАПЛАСТ',id:'52'}
];

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{
  window.webhookUrl=localStorage.getItem('bx_webhook')||'';
  if(window.webhookUrl){document.getElementById('webhookUrl').value=window.webhookUrl;mWS(true)}
  renderChips('devGrid',DEVS);renderChips('mgrGrid',MGRS);renderChips('obsGrid',OBSS);renderProjs();uRB();

  initDynamicFields('todo');
  initDynamicFields('dod');

  document.querySelectorAll('textarea[data-icon-field]').forEach(ta=>{
    ta.addEventListener('input',()=>{ag(ta);ufi();up()});
    ta.addEventListener('paste',()=>setTimeout(()=>{ag(ta);ufi();up()},0));
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('textarea').forEach(ta=>{ta.addEventListener('input',()=>ag(ta));ta.addEventListener('paste',()=>setTimeout(()=>ag(ta),0))});
  document.getElementById('taskTitle').addEventListener('input',function(){document.getElementById('titleCount').textContent=this.value.length+' / 255';if(this.value.trim()){this.classList.remove('error');document.getElementById('titleError').classList.remove('show')}});

  const fi=document.getElementById('fileInput'),dz=document.getElementById('dropZone');
  fi.addEventListener('change',e=>{hF(Array.from(e.target.files));fi.value=''});
  dz.addEventListener('dragover',e=>{e.preventDefault();dz.classList.add('drag-over')});
  dz.addEventListener('dragleave',()=>dz.classList.remove('drag-over'));
  dz.addEventListener('drop',e=>{e.preventDefault();dz.classList.remove('drag-over');hF(Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files))});

  document.querySelectorAll('.quick-dl').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',function(){const d=parseInt(this.dataset.days),dt=new Date();dt.setDate(dt.getDate()+d);document.getElementById('taskDeadline').value=dt.toISOString().split('T')[0];document.querySelectorAll('.quick-dl').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('flash'));this.classList.add('flash');setTimeout(()=>this.classList.remove('flash'),1500)}));

  document.getElementById('gearBtn').addEventListener('click',()=>{settingsOpen?cS():oS()});
  document.getElementById('btnSaveWebhook').addEventListener('click',sWH);
  document.getElementById('repeatBtn').addEventListener('click',rL);
  document.getElementById('flameIcon').addEventListener('click',tF);
  document.getElementById('taskForm').addEventListener('submit',hS);
  document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
    if((e.ctrlKey||e.metaKey)&&e.key==='Enter'){e.preventDefault();document.getElementById('taskForm').dispatchEvent(new Event('submit',{cancelable:true}))}
    if(e.key==='Escape'&&settingsOpen)cS();
  });
  document.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(settingsOpen&&!e.target.closest('#settingsPanel')&&!e.target.closest('#gearBtn'))cS()});
  document.getElementById('sidebarToggle').addEventListener('click',()=>{
    const body=document.getElementById('sidebarBody'),chev=document.getElementById('sidebarChevron');

    chev.classList.toggle('open',isOpen);
  });
  ufi();
});

function sC(ch){const grid=ch.dataset.grid,was=ch.classList.contains('active');ch.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.crew-chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active','dimmed'));if(was){if(grid==='devGrid')selectedDevId=null;else if(grid==='mgrGrid')selectedMgrId=null;else selectedObsId=null}else{ch.classList.add('active');ch.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.crew-chip').forEach(c=>{if(c!==ch)c.classList.add('dimmed')});if(grid==='devGrid')selectedDevId=ch.dataset.id;else if(grid==='mgrGrid')selectedMgrId=ch.dataset.id;else selectedObsId=ch.dataset.id}}

function uRB(){document.getElementById('repeatBtn').disabled=!localStorage.getItem('bx_last_task')}
function rL(){const raw=localStorage.getItem('bx_last_task');if(!raw)return;try{const d=JSON.parse(raw);document.getElementById('taskTitle').value=d.title||'';document.getElementById('titleCount').textContent=(d.title||'').length+' / 255';if(d.flameOn&&!flameOn)tF();else if(!d.flameOn&&flameOn)tF();tags=d.tags?[...d.tags]:[];if(d.deadline)document.getElementById('taskDeadline').value=d.deadline;if(d.devId){const c=document.querySelector(`#devGrid .crew-chip[data-id="${d.devId}"]`);if(c)sC(c)}if(d.mgrId){const c=document.querySelector(`#mgrGrid .crew-chip[data-id="${d.mgrId}"]`);if(c)sC(c)}if(d.obsId){const c=document.querySelector(`#obsGrid .crew-chip[data-id="${d.obsId}"]`);if(c)sC(c)}if(d.projId){const c=document.querySelector(`#projGrid .proj-chip[data-id="${d.projId}"]`);if(c)sP(c)}const m={goal:'fieldGoal',materials:'fieldMaterials',contact:'fieldContact'};Object.entries(m).forEach(([k,id])=>{if(d.f&&d.f[k]){const el=document.getElementById(id);el.value=d.f[k];ag(el)}});if(d.f&&d.f.todo&&Array.isArray(d.f.todo)){resetDynamicFields('todo');d.f.todo.forEach(v=>{if(v)addDynamicField('todo',v)})}else{resetDynamicFields('todo')}if(d.f&&d.f.dod&&Array.isArray(d.f.dod)){resetDynamicFields('dod');d.f.dod.forEach(v=>{if(v)addDynamicField('dod',v)})}else{resetDynamicFields('dod')}ufi();up();showT('success','Загружена прошл задача','Проверь и отправь')}catch{showT('error','Ошибка','Не удалось восстановить')}}

function rFL(){const l=document.getElementById('fileList');l.innerHTML='';selectedFiles.forEach((f,i)=>{const e=document.createElement('div');e.className='file-item';e.innerHTML=`<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" stroke="var(--text-d)" stroke-width="1"><path d="M1 3v6a1 1 0 001 1h8a1 1 0 001-1V4a1 1 0 00-1-1H5.5L4.5 2H2a1 1 0 00-1 1z"/></svg><span class="file-item-name">${esc(f.name)}</span><span class="file-item-size">${fSz(f.size)}</span><span class="file-item-status" id="fs-${i}"></span><span class="file-item-remove" data-fi="${i}">×</span>`;l.appendChild(e)});l.querySelectorAll('.file-item-remove').forEach(r=>r.addEventListener('click',()=>{selectedFiles.splice(parseInt(r.dataset.fi),1);rFL();const ff=document.querySelectorAll('.section-field')[4];if(ff)ff.dataset.state='empty'}))}
function fSz(b){return b<1024?b+' B':b<1048576?(b/1024).toFixed(1)+' KB':(b/1048576).toFixed(1)+' MB'}

function tF(){const i=document.getElementById('flameIcon'),l=document.getElementById('flameLabel');if(i.classList.contains('igniting')||i.classList.contains('extinguishing'))return;if(!flameOn){flameOn=true;i.classList.add('lit','igniting');l.classList.add('on');setTimeout(()=>i.classList.remove('igniting'),460)}else{flameOn=false;i.classList.remove('lit');i.classList.add('extinguishing');l.classList.remove('on');setTimeout(()=>i.classList.remove('extinguishing'),320)}}

function bD(){const g=id=>{const e=document.getElementById(id);return e?e.value.trim():''};const p=[];if(g('fieldGoal'))p.push('Цель:\n'+g('fieldGoal'));const todoVals=getDynamicValues('todo');if(todoVals.length)p.push('Что сделать:\n'+todoVals.join('\n'));const dodVals=getDynamicValues('dod');if(dodVals.length)p.push('Критерии приёмки:\n'+dodVals.join('\n'));if(g('fieldContact'))p.push('Контакт:\n'+g('fieldContact'));if(g('fieldMaterials'))p.push('Материалы:\n'+g('fieldMaterials'));return p.join('\n\n')}
function up(){const d=bD(),el=document.getElementById('descPreview');if(d){el.textContent=d;el.classList.add('has-content')}else{el.textContent='Заполни поля — здесь появится текст';el.classList.remove('has-content')}}

function val(){let ok=true;const t=document.getElementById('taskTitle');if(!t.value.trim()){t.classList.add('error');document.getElementById('titleError').classList.add('show');ok=false}return ok}

async function hS(e){
  e.preventDefault();if(!val()){showT('error','Заполни обязательные','Название задачи обязательно');return}
  const cw=document.getElementById('webhookUrl').value.trim()||window.webhookUrl;
  if(!cw){showT('error','Вебхук не указан','Шестерёнка → URL → Сохрани');return}
  if(!selectedDevId){showT('error','Выбери разработчика','');return}
  if(!selectedMgrId){showT('error','Выбери постановщика','');return}
  if(!selectedProjId){showT('error','Выбери проект','');return}
  const hook=cw.endsWith('/')?cw:cw+'/',dl=document.getElementById('taskDeadline').value;

  // RESPONSIBLE_ID = разработчик (исполнитель задачи)
  // CREATED_BY = постановщик
  // Наблюдатель — отдельный запрос ПОСЛЕ создания (AUDITORS не работает в tasks.task.add)
  const payload={fields:{
    TITLE:document.getElementById('taskTitle').value.trim(),
    DESCRIPTION:bD(),
    GROUP_ID:parseInt(selectedProjId),
    RESPONSIBLE_ID:parseInt(selectedDevId),
    CREATED_BY:parseInt(selectedMgrId),
    PRIORITY:flameOn?2:0,
    STATUS:2,
    TAGS:tags
  }};

  if(dl)payload.fields.DEADLINE=dl+'T18:00:00+03:00';

  localStorage.setItem('bx_last_task',JSON.stringify({title:payload.fields.TITLE,flameOn,tags:[...tags],deadline:dl,devId:selectedDevId,mgrId:selectedMgrId,obsId:selectedObsId,projId:selectedProjId,f:{goal:document.getElementById('fieldGoal').value,todo:getDynamicValues('todo'),dod:getDynamicValues('dod'),contact:document.getElementById('fieldContact').value,materials:document.getElementById('fieldMaterials').value}}));
  uRB();

  const btn=document.getElementById('submitBtn'),bt=btn.querySelector('.btn-text');
  btn.classList.add('loading');btn.disabled=true;bt.textContent='Создаём...';
  try{
    const res=await fetch(hook+'tasks.task.add',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    const data=await res.json();

    if(data.result?.task?.id){
      const tid=data.result.task.id;

      // Наблюдатель — ВСЕГДА отдельный запрос после создания
      let obsMsg='';
      if(selectedObsId){
        bt.textContent='Наблюдатель...';
        obsMsg=await addObs(hook,tid,selectedObsId);
      }

      if(selectedFiles.length){bt.textContent=`Файлы (${selectedFiles.length})...`;await uFL(hook,tid)}

      const dn=document.querySelector(`#devGrid .crew-chip[data-id="${selectedDevId}"] span:nth-child(2)`)?.textContent||'#'+selectedDevId;
      const pn=PROJS.find(p=>p.id===selectedProjId)?.name||'#'+selectedProjId;
      let msg=`${dn} → ${pn}`;
      if(flameOn) msg+=' · Важная';
      if(obsMsg) msg+=obsMsg;

      showT('success',`Задача #${tid}`,msg);
      rF();
    }else if(data.error){showT('error','Ошибка Bitrix24',data.error_description||data.error)}
    else{showT('error','Неизвестный ответ',JSON.stringify(data).slice(0,120))}
  }catch(err){if(err.name==='TypeError')showT('error','CORS','Открой через Live Server или python -m http.server');else showT('error','Ошибка сети',err.message)}
  finally{btn.classList.remove('loading');btn.disabled=false;bt.textContent='Создать задачу';document.getElementById('uploadProgress').classList.remove('show');document.getElementById('uploadBar').style.width='0%'}
}

// Наблюдатель — пробуем несколько вариантов эндпоинта Bitrix24
async function addObs(hook,taskId,userId){
  const variants=[
    // Вариант 1: task.observers.add (документированный метод)
    {endpoint:'task.observers.add', body:{TASK_ID:taskId, USER_ID:[parseInt(userId)]}},
    // Вариант 2: tasks.task.observers.add (альтернативное пространство имён)
    {endpoint:'tasks.task.observers.add', body:{TASK_ID:taskId, USER_ID:[parseInt(userId)]}},
    // Вариант 3: task.observers.add с числовым USER_ID
    {endpoint:'task.observers.add', body:{TASK_ID:taskId, USER_ID:parseInt(userId)}},
    // Вариант 4: tasks.task.update с полем AUDITORS
    {endpoint:'tasks.task.update', body:{taskId:taskId, fields:{AUDITORS:[parseInt(userId)]}}},
  ];

  for(const v of variants){
    try{
      const r=await fetch(hook+v.endpoint,{
        method:'POST',
        headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
        body:JSON.stringify(v.body)
      });
      const d=await r.json();
      if(!d.error && (d.result===true || d.result?.result===true || d.result)){
        console.log('Наблюдатель добавлен через:', v.endpoint, d);
        return ' · Наблюдатель ✓';
      }
      console.warn('Попытка', v.endpoint, ':', d.error_description||d.error);
    }catch(err){
      console.warn('Ошибка запроса', v.endpoint, ':', err.message);
    }
  }
  return ' · ⚠ Наблюдатель не добавлен';
}

async function uFL(hook,tid){
  if(!selectedFiles.length)return;
  document.getElementById('uploadProgress').classList.add('show');
  let failCount=0;
  const failNames=[];
  const diskIds=[];

  for(let i=0;i<selectedFiles.length;i++){
    const f=selectedFiles[i],s=document.getElementById(`fs-${i}`);
    if(s)s.textContent='…';
    let ok=false;
    let lastErr='';

    try{
      // Шаг 1: получить upload URL через disk.folder.uploadfile
      const url1=hook+'disk.folder.uploadfile?id=3&uploadFile='+encodeURIComponent(f.name);
      const r1=await fetch(url1);
      if(!r1.ok){lastErr='HTTP '+r1.status+' при получении URL';throw new Error(lastErr)}
      const d1=await r1.json();
      console.log('[Upload v5] Step 1 ('+f.name+'):',JSON.stringify(d1).slice(0,300));
      if(d1.error){lastErr=d1.error_description||d1.error;throw new Error(lastErr)}
      if(!d1.result){lastErr='Пустой результат';throw new Error(lastErr)}

      const upUrl=d1.result.uploadUrl||d1.result.UPLOAD_URL;
      const fieldName=d1.result.field||d1.result.fieldId||'file';
      if(!upUrl){lastErr='Нет uploadUrl';throw new Error(lastErr)}

      // Шаг 2: пробуем 3 метода загрузки на uploadUrl — первый рабочий побеждает
      let diskId=null;

      // Метод A: сырой бинарник через fetch (Content-Type = MIME файла)
      try{
        const buf=await f.arrayBuffer();
        console.log('[Upload v5] Method A: raw binary ('+f.name+')');
        const rA=await fetch(upUrl,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':f.type||'application/octet-stream'},body:buf});
        const tA=await rA.text();
        let dA;try{dA=JSON.parse(tA)}catch(_){dA=null}
        console.log('[Upload v5] Method A response ('+f.name+'):',rA.status,tA.slice(0,200));
        if(rA.ok&&dA&&!dA.error&&dA.result){
          diskId=dA.result.ID||dA.result.id;
          if(diskId){console.log('[Upload v5] Method A OK! diskId='+diskId+' ('+f.name+')')}
        }
      }catch(eA){console.warn('[Upload v5] Method A failed ('+f.name+'):',eA.message)}

      // Метод B: XHR + FormData
      if(!diskId){
        try{
          console.log('[Upload v5] Method B: XHR+FormData ('+f.name+')');
          const dB=await new Promise((res,rej)=>{
            const fd=new FormData();fd.append(fieldName,f,f.name);
            const xhr=new XMLHttpRequest();
            xhr.open('POST',upUrl,true);
            xhr.onload=()=>{try{res({status:xhr.status,json:JSON.parse(xhr.responseText)})}catch(e){rej(new Error('Non-JSON: '+xhr.responseText.slice(0,120)))}};
            xhr.onerror=()=>rej(new Error('XHR network error'));
            xhr.send(fd);
          });
          console.log('[Upload v5] Method B response ('+f.name+'):',dB.status,JSON.stringify(dB.json).slice(0,200));
          if(dB.status<400&&!dB.json.error&&dB.json.result){
            diskId=dB.json.result.ID||dB.json.result.id;
            if(diskId)console.log('[Upload v5] Method B OK! diskId='+diskId+' ('+f.name+')');
          }
        }catch(eB){console.warn('[Upload v5] Method B failed ('+f.name+'):',eB.message)}
      }

      // Метод C: fetch + FormData
      if(!diskId){
        try{
          console.log('[Upload v5] Method C: fetch+FormData ('+f.name+')');
          const fd=new FormData();fd.append(fieldName,f,f.name);
          const rC=await fetch(upUrl,{method:'POST',body:fd});
          const tC=await rC.text();
          let dC;try{dC=JSON.parse(tC)}catch(_){dC=null}
          console.log('[Upload v5] Method C response ('+f.name+'):',rC.status,tC.slice(0,200));
          if(rC.ok&&dC&&!dC.error&&dC.result){
            diskId=dC.result.ID||dC.result.id;
            if(diskId)console.log('[Upload v5] Method C OK! diskId='+diskId+' ('+f.name+')');
          }
        }catch(eC){console.warn('[Upload v5] Method C failed ('+f.name+'):',eC.message)}
      }

      if(!diskId){lastErr='Все методы загрузки провалились';throw new Error(lastErr)}
      diskIds.push(diskId);
      ok=true;
    }catch(e){
      lastErr=e.message;
      console.error('[Upload v5] ERROR ('+f.name+'):',e);
    }

    if(!ok){if(s)s.textContent='✕';failCount++;failNames.push(f.name+': '+lastErr)}
    else{if(s)s.textContent='✓'}
    document.getElementById('uploadBar').style.width=Math.round(((i+1)/selectedFiles.length)*100)+'%';
  }

  // Привязка загруженных файлов к задаче
  if(diskIds.length>0){
    try{
      const nIds=diskIds.map(id=>'n'+id);
      console.log('[Attach] Привязка файлов:',nIds.join(', '),'к задаче #'+tid);
      const r3=await fetch(hook+'tasks.task.update',{
        method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
        body:JSON.stringify({taskId:tid,fields:{UF_TASK_WEBDAV_FILES:nIds}})
      });
      const d3=await r3.json();
      console.log('[Attach] Результат:',JSON.stringify(d3).slice(0,300));
      if(d3.error){
        console.log('[Attach] Массовая привязка не удалась, пробуем по одному...');
        for(const did of diskIds){
          try{
            const r4=await fetch(hook+'tasks.task.update',{
              method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
              body:JSON.stringify({taskId:tid,fields:{UF_TASK_WEBDAV_FILES:['n'+did]}})
            });
            const d4=await r4.json();
            if(d4.error)console.warn('[Attach] Ошибка привязки n'+did+':',d4.error_description);
          }catch(e2){console.warn('[Attach] Ошибка привязки n'+did+':',e2.message)}
        }
      }
    }catch(e){console.error('[Attach] ERROR:',e)}
  }

  if(failCount>0&&failNames.length){
    showT('error','Файлы: '+failCount+'/'+selectedFiles.length+' не загружено',failNames.slice(0,3).join('\n'));
  }
  return failCount;
}

function rF(){
  document.querySelectorAll('textarea[data-icon-field]').forEach(ta=>{if(!ta.classList.contains('dynamic-input')){ta.value='';ta.style.height='auto'}});
  document.getElementById('taskTitle').value='';document.getElementById('taskDeadline').value='';document.getElementById('titleCount').textContent='0 / 255';
  document.getElementById('fieldContact').value='';document.getElementById('fieldContact').style.height='auto';
  if(flameOn){const i=document.getElementById('flameIcon'),l=document.getElementById('flameLabel');flameOn=false;i.className='flame-icon';l.classList.remove('on')}
  tags=[];selectedFiles=[];rFL();
  selectedDevId=null;selectedMgrId=null;selectedObsId=null;selectedProjId=null;
  document.querySelectorAll('.crew-chip,.proj-chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active','dimmed'));
  resetDynamicFields('todo');resetDynamicFields('dod');
  ufi();up();document.querySelectorAll('.quick-dl').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('flash'));
}

function initDynamicFields(group){
  const container=document.getElementById(group+'DynamicFields');
  if(!container)return;
  container.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    const btn=e.target.closest('.add-field-btn');
    if(btn&&btn.dataset.group===group){addDynamicField(group);e.preventDefault()}
    const rm=e.target.closest('.remove-field-btn');
    if(rm&&rm.dataset.group===group){removeDynamicField(group,rm.closest('.dynamic-field-row'));e.preventDefault()}
  });
  container.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
    if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){
      const ta=e.target.closest('textarea.dynamic-input');
      if(ta&&ta.dataset.group===group){
        const rows=container.querySelectorAll('.dynamic-field-row');
        if(rows.length<MAX_DYNAMIC){e.preventDefault();addDynamicField(group)}
      }
    }
  });
}

function addDynamicFields(group,value){
  addDynamicField(group,value);
}

function addDynamicField(group,value){
  const container=document.getElementById(group+'DynamicFields');
  if(!container)return;
  const rows=container.querySelectorAll('.dynamic-field-row');
  if(rows.length>=MAX_DYNAMIC)return;
  const row=document.createElement('div');
  row.className='dynamic-field-row';
  const ta=document.createElement('textarea');
  ta.className='dynamic-input';
  ta.dataset.group=group;
  ta.dataset.iconField='';
  ta.rows=1;
  ta.placeholder='Продолжение...';
  if(value)ta.value=value;
  const rmBtn=document.createElement('button');
  rmBtn.type='button';
  rmBtn.className='remove-field-btn';
  rmBtn.dataset.group=group;
  rmBtn.title='Удалить поле';
  rmBtn.textContent='×';
  const addBtn=document.createElement('button');
  addBtn.type='button';
  addBtn.className='add-field-btn';
  addBtn.dataset.group=group;
  addBtn.title='Добавить поле';
  addBtn.textContent='+';
  row.appendChild(ta);
  row.appendChild(rmBtn);
  row.appendChild(addBtn);
  container.appendChild(row);
  ag(ta);
  ta.addEventListener('input',()=>{ag(ta);ufi();up()});
  ta.addEventListener('paste',()=>setTimeout(()=>{ag(ta);ufi();up()},0));
  ta.focus();
  updateDynamicCount(group);
  ufi();up();
}

function removeDynamicField(group,row){
  const container=document.getElementById(group+'DynamicFields');
  if(!container)return;
  const rows=container.querySelectorAll('.dynamic-field-row');
  if(rows.length<=1)return;
  row.remove();
  updateDynamicCount(group);
  ufi();up();
}

function resetDynamicFields(group){
  const container=document.getElementById(group+'DynamicFields');
  if(!container)return;
  container.innerHTML='';
  const row=document.createElement('div');
  row.className='dynamic-field-row';
  const ta=document.createElement('textarea');
  ta.className='dynamic-input';
  ta.dataset.group=group;
  ta.dataset.iconField='';
  ta.rows=1;
  ta.placeholder=group==='todo'?'- действие 1\n- действие 2':'- что проверяем при сдаче';
  const addBtn=document.createElement('button');
  addBtn.type='button';
  addBtn.className='add-field-btn';
  addBtn.dataset.group=group;
  addBtn.title='Добавить поле';
  addBtn.textContent='+';
  row.appendChild(ta);
  row.appendChild(addBtn);
  container.appendChild(row);
  ta.addEventListener('input',()=>{ag(ta);ufi();up()});
  ta.addEventListener('paste',()=>setTimeout(()=>{ag(ta);ufi();up()},0));
  updateDynamicCount(group);
}

function updateDynamicCount(group){
  const container=document.getElementById(group+'DynamicFields');
  const countEl=document.getElementById(group+'Count');
  if(!container||!countEl)return;
  const rows=container.querySelectorAll('.dynamic-field-row');
  countEl.textContent=rows.length+' / '+MAX_DYNAMIC;
}

function getDynamicValues(group){
  const container=document.getElementById(group+'DynamicFields');
  if(!container)return[];
  const vals=[];
  container.querySelectorAll('textarea.dynamic-input').forEach(ta=>{const v=ta.value.trim();if(v)vals.push(v)});
  return vals;
}

function ag(el){el.style.height='auto';el.style.height=el.scrollHeight+'px'}
function ufi(){document.querySelectorAll('.section-field').forEach(sf=>{if(sf.id==='todoSection'||sf.id==='dodSection'){const inputs=sf.querySelectorAll('textarea.dynamic-input');let hasVal=false;inputs.forEach(ta=>{if(ta.value.trim())hasVal=true});sf.dataset.state=hasVal?'filled':'empty'}else{const ta=sf.querySelector('textarea[data-icon-field]');if(ta)sf.dataset.state=ta.value.trim()?'filled':'empty'}})}
function esc(s){return s.replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"')}

let toastTimer;
function showT(type,title,msg){const t=document.getElementById('toast');document.getElementById('toastIcon').textContent=type==='success'?'✓':'✕';document.getElementById('toastTitle').textContent=title;document.getElementById('toastMsg').textContent=msg||'';t.className='toast '+type+' show';clearTimeout(toastTimer);toastTimer=setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),6000)}
</script>


</body></html>
